expect: GAP-2 closed: bulletin.py gains frontier-query/frontier-respond protocol. L3+ lesson on coordination bottleneck.
actual: GAP-2 CLOSED. bulletin.py extended with 3 new commands (frontier-query, frontier-respond, frontier-inbox) and 2 new bulletin types. swarm_peer.py exchange enhanced to include frontier state. Tested: 11/11 active frontiers extracted correctly. L-1328 written (L3).
diff: Expected bidirectional sync: GOT bidirectional sync. Clean resolution, no surprises.

changes.tools/bulletin.py: Added frontier-query/frontier-response types, _extract_active_frontiers(), write_frontier_query(), write_frontier_response(), frontier_inbox(), CLI commands
changes.tools/swarm_peer.py: Added _extract_local_frontiers(), enhanced cmd_exchange() with frontier state, enhanced cmd_fetch() with peer frontier display

self_apply: coordination protocol IS swarm coordination — the tool enables what the lesson describes
external_grounding: TCP/IP request-response vs UDP broadcast; bacterial quorum sensing (broadcast to bidirectional at density threshold); Paxos consensus requires request-response
